content.speakerText: Just pull the paper out gently from the back, then hit reset.
content.speakerTextCn: 从后面轻轻把纸拉出来，再按重置键。

options.text: So, open the front, pull the paper, and turn off the machine.
So, back panel, pull slowly, then reset—got it!
I'll just force it out and press the power button.
Do I need to unplug it before doing anything?

content.explanation: 正确答案复述了原指令的关键动作：back panel（后盖）、pull slowly（慢点拉）、reset（重置），符合‘确认步骤’场景中复述以确保理解的要求。干扰项1混淆了前后部操作，干扰项3使用了危险动作（force it out），干扰项4是提问而非确认，不符合复述确认的指令。

content.speakerText: First, disconnect the power cable. Then, remove the cover and clean the filter.
content.speakerTextCn: 首先，断开电源线。然后，取下盖子并清洁滤网。

options.text: So, unplug it, take off the cover, and clean the filter—got it!
I think I should clean it first, then unplug.
Can I use a vacuum to clean the filter?

content.explanation: 正确答案准确复述了步骤顺序和关键动词（unplug, take off, clean），符合确认步骤的核心要求。干扰项1顺序错误，干扰项3是额外提问而非确认，干扰项4是拖延回应，未体现理解确认。

content.speakerText: Log in with your ID, then navigate to Settings and click Save.
content.speakerTextCn: 用你的账号登录，然后进入设置并点击保存。

options.text: So, sign in, go to Settings, and hit Save—understood.
I'll log in with my password and then exit.
Is Save the same as Apply?
I'll try to find the Settings later.

content.explanation: 正确答案完整复述了三个关键动作：sign in（登录）、go to Settings（进入设置）、hit Save（点击保存），并使用了确认语气（understood）。干扰项1遗漏关键动作且用��错误（exit），干扰项3是提问而非确认，干扰项4是拖延，未体现即时理解。

content.template: So, ___ the paper out gently from the back, then ___ reset.
content.hint: 描述操作动作的动词，需与设备操作语境匹配
content.knowledgePoint: 设备操作动词搭配（pull out, hit reset）

content.template: First, ___ the power, then ___ the cover and clean the filter.
content.hint: 安全操作的第一步和第二步动词
content.knowledgePoint: 操作流程动词顺序（disconnect → remove）

content.template: So, ___ in with your ID, go to Settings, and ___ Save—got it!
content.hint: 数字系统操作中的标准表达
content.knowledgePoint: 系统操作固定搭配（log in, click Save）

content.speakerText: Just pull the paper out gently from the back, then hit reset.
content.speakerTextCn: 从后面轻轻把纸拉出来，再按重置键。
expectedAnswers: So, back panel, pull slowly, then reset—got it!
I'll pull the paper from the back gently and press reset.
Let me confirm: pull from the back, then hit reset. Understood.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确复述了两个操作步骤
语言准确性：使用了正确的动词（pull, hit/press）和介词（from）
表达自然度：使用了口语确认语气（got it!/understood）
关键词覆盖：包含 'back', 'pull', 'reset' 等核心词汇

content.speakerText: First, disconnect the power cable. Then, remove the cover and clean the filter.
content.speakerTextCn: 首先，断开电源线。然后，取下盖子并清洁滤网。
expectedAnswers: So, unplug it, take off the cover, and clean the filter—got it!
I'll disconnect the power, remove the cover, and clean the filter.
Confirming: disconnect power → remove cover → clean filter. Understood.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：完整复述三个步骤且顺序正确
语言准确性：使用了恰当的操作动词（disconnect, remove, clean）
表达自然度：使用了确认语气或结构化复述
关键词覆盖：包含 'power', 'cover', 'filter' 等关键名词

content.speakerText: Log in with your ID, then navigate to Settings and click Save.
content.speakerTextCn: 用你的账号登录，然后进入设置并点击保存。
expectedAnswers: So, sign in, go to Settings, and click Save—understood.
I'll log in, find Settings, and press Save.
Confirming: login → Settings → Save. Got it!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确复述三个操作步骤
语言准确性：使用了正确的动词搭配（log in, navigate to, click Save）
表达自然度：使用了口语化确认结构（got it!/understood）
关键词覆盖：包含 'ID', 'Settings', 'Save' 等系统关键术语
